name: Icon
description: Wrapper around HugeIcons React — gives access to 4000+ icons with stroke, duotone, solid and bulk styles. Import icon data from @hugeicons/core-free-icons (free) or @hugeicons/pro (paid) and pass it to the icon prop. Supports size, strokeWidth, primaryColor, secondaryColor and all standard SVG props.

examples.description: Large duotone icon with custom colors
